title: External validation of the Predicting Asthma Risk in Children tool in a clinical cohort.
author: Berger DO Pedersen ESL Mallet MC de Jong CCM Usemann J Regamey N Spycher BD Ardura-Garcia C Kuehni CE SPAC Study Team
content:
S-EPMC9804745 PMC9804745 External validation of the Predicting Asthma Risk in Children tool in a clinical cohort.

Introduction

The Predicting Asthma Risk in Children (PARC) tool uses questionnaire-based respiratory symptoms collected from preschool children to predict asthma risk 5 years
